payload.description: The MTA logo appears throughout the Transit All-Stars publication
NYCT is the operating agency referenced throughout Transit All-Stars for employees across Subways, Buses, and Paratransit departments
NYCT Department of Subways, referenced in Transit All-Stars employee profiles of John Villanueva, Anthony Parlato, Fidias Casado, Shaquana Mills, and Tyrone Bain
NYCT Department of Buses, referenced in Transit All-Stars employee profiles of Berchel Fredrick, Michael Caruana, Celeste Farage-Yee, and Sergio Henry

Subway Performance, Evaluation, Education, and Development Unit - Department of Subways. The team traverses nearly every mile of the subway to conduct tests determining whether specific segments of track can safely support higher speeds.

payload.title: Director, SPEED Unit Department of Subways
payload.description: Director of Subways' SPEED Unit. Began at NYCT as a Conductor in 2006. Roles included Tower Operator, Train Operator, and Dispatcher before transitioning into management within the Service Delivery Division in 2019.

payload.title: Train Service Supervisor Department of Subways
payload.description: Original member of the SPEED Unit. Began career at NYCT in 2012. Participated in over 4000 signal tests and implemented over 400 speed increases.

payload.title: Train Service Supervisor Department of Subways
payload.description: Member of the SPEED Unit. Started as a bus operator in 2013 before transitioning to current role in 2019. Eleven-year tenure at NYCT.

payload.title: Train Service Supervisor Department of Subways
payload.description: Latest addition to the SPEED Unit, joining in 2022.

payload.title: Train Service Supervisor Department of Subways
payload.description: Recent addition to the SPEED Unit, brings 10 years of experience as a Train Operator. March 2024 Transit All-Star.

payload.title: Bus Operator
payload.description: Bus Operator from Queens Village Depot, Department of Buses.

payload.title: Farebox Maintainer Department of Buses
payload.description: Bus Farebox Maintainer at JFK Depot since 2016.

payload.title: Director of Administration
payload.description: Director of Administration for the Office of the Senior Vice President of Buses. Over 30 years with NYCT - first half on Subways side, latter part with Buses.

payload.title: Bus Operator
payload.description: Bus Operator from Yonkers Depot, Department of Buses. Joined the Agency in May 2021.

payload.title: Associate Transit Management Analyst Paratransit
payload.description: Associate Transit Management Analyst in the Department of Paratransit's Finance & Administration Unit. Nineteen years of experience at NYCT.

tool_args.label: SPEED Unit over 70 years operational experience
On-Time Performance at or above 83% since 2022

payload.raw_value_text: On-Time Performance remained at or above 83% since 2022!

tool_args.label: Over 3,000 operators in 28 depots received Safety Jackets

payload.raw_value_text: over a total of 4,000 attendance awards

payload.description: Department of Paratransit's Finance & Administration Unit. Emmanuel Dorcely works in this department.

payload.claim_text: The SPEED Unit's mission involves traversing nearly every mile of the subway to conduct tests. These tests determine whether specific segments of track can safely support higher speeds than currently permitted.
payload.subject: SPEED Unit

tool_args.label: John Villanueva participates in CBTC projects

payload.claim_text: John Villanueva actively participates in Communications-Based Train Control (CBTC) projects, collaborates with Subways' Performance Analysis Unit and the Operations Planning Department on Performance Improvement Pilot Projects, and engages with Service Delivery Field Management regarding incident investigations, reenactments, and problem-solving.
payload.subject: John Villanueva

payload.claim_text: As a part of the SPEED Unit, Anthony Parlato takes safety to heart by ensuring proper signaling to prevent train collisions and operating trains to expedite train movements during emergencies.
payload.subject: Anthony Parlato

payload.claim_text: Fidias Casado actively collaborates with other departments to ensure a coordinated approach to subway system management. His ability to build strong relationships and leverage resources effectively has resulted in cross-functional solutions that have further enhanced subway reliability.
payload.subject: Fidias Casado

payload.claim_text: Shaquana Mills' dedication has contributed significantly to the department of Subways' commitment to improving On-Time Performance.
payload.subject: Shaquana Mills

payload.claim_text: Celeste Farage-Yee orchestrated the initial rollout of the Operator Safety Jackets, having the jackets ordered and distributed to over 3,000 operators in 28 depots in a short period of time.
payload.subject: Celeste Farage-Yee

payload.claim_text: Emmanuel Dorcely has been instrumental in Paratransit's compliance with annual National Transit Database (NTD) reporting in accordance with Federal Transit Administration (FTA).
payload.subject: Emmanuel Dorcely

payload.claim_text: A recent commendation sent by a pleased customer to MTA Chairman & CEO Janno Lieber praised Bus Operator Sergio Henry for helping a customer with a walker board and be seated safely.
payload.subject: Sergio Henry
